# Branch and Root Consulting

> Orange County, CA lead generation and customer reactivation agency for local service businesses (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, landscaping). We help businesses recover dormant revenue, capture every new inbound lead within 90 seconds, and grow through local search visibility.

## Core Pages

- [Services](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/services): Our three integrated systems — Customer Reactivation Engine, Instant Responder System, and Local Growth Engine.
- [Service Bundles](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/bundles): Packaged pricing for combining our services.
- [FAQ](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/faq): How our process works and common questions answered.
- [About](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/about): Who we are — an Orange County family team serving Mission Viejo, Rancho Santa Margarita, Ladera Ranch, Aliso Viejo, and San Clemente.
- [Contact & Book](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/contact): Free consultation booking.

## Expert Content

- [Lead Generation Hiring Guide](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides): 35 expert answers covering hiring lead gen specialists, agency vs. in-house decisions, pricing, tools, and metrics for local service businesses.
- [All Guides — The Full Library](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/all-guides): Complete category-organized index of every published guide.

### Hiring Decisions
- [Should I Hire a Lead Gen Agency or a Sales Team Member?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/hire-lead-gen-agency-vs-sales-team): Breaks down the tradeoffs between bringing on an agency and hiring an in-house sales team member for lead generation.
- [What to Look for When Hiring a Lead Generation Expert](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/what-to-look-for-in-lead-generation-expert): The key skills, traits, and experience markers that separate effective lead gen hires from costly mistakes.
- [How Do I Know If a Lead Generation Agency Is Right for My Company?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/is-a-lead-gen-agency-right-for-my-company): A practical self-assessment to determine whether outsourcing lead generation makes sense for your business stage.
- [Should I Hire a Fractional Lead Generation Specialist?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/fractional-lead-generation-specialist): Explains what fractional lead gen looks like, who it fits, and how to structure the engagement.
- [Can I Hire a Lead Generation Person Part-Time?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/part-time-lead-generation-hire): What to expect from a part-time lead gen hire and whether the model can realistically produce results.
- [Lead Generation Hiring: Remote vs. In-Office?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/lead-gen-remote-vs-in-office): Compares productivity, accountability, and culture fit considerations when choosing between remote and on-site lead gen staff.
- [Is Lead Generation a Good Career Path?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/lead-generation-as-a-career): What candidates and employers should understand about long-term growth potential in lead generation roles.
- [How Much Experience Should a Lead Gen Hire Have?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/experience-level-for-lead-gen-hire): A guide to calibrating experience requirements to your business size, sales cycle, and available budget.
- [Should My Lead Gen Hire Also Do Sales?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/should-lead-gen-hire-also-do-sales): Explores when combining lead generation and closing duties makes sense versus when it undermines both functions.

### Costs & Compensation
- [How Much Does It Cost to Hire a Lead Generation Specialist?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/cost-to-hire-lead-generation-specialist): Salary ranges, contractor rates, and total cost-of-hire breakdowns for lead gen roles across experience levels.
- [Lead Generation Salary: What Should I Pay?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/lead-generation-salary-guide): Current market benchmarks for lead generation compensation, including base, bonus, and commission structures.
- [Should I Offer Commission-Based Pay for Lead Generation?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/commission-pay-for-lead-generation): Analyzes the pros and cons of commission-only and hybrid pay models for lead gen specialists.

### Finding & Vetting Talent
- [Do I Have a Lead Generation Problem or a Sales Problem?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/lead-generation-problem-vs-sales-problem): Helps owners diagnose whether the bottleneck is in generating leads or converting them before making a hire.
- [How to Find Qualified Lead Generation Professionals](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/find-qualified-lead-generation-professionals): Where to source, how to screen, and what channels consistently yield the strongest lead gen candidates.
- [What Questions Should I Ask When Hiring a Lead Gen Specialist?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/questions-to-ask-when-hiring-lead-gen): An interview question bank designed to surface real experience and expose candidates who exaggerate results.
- [How to Qualify Leads: Best Practices for Your Business](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/how-to-qualify-leads-best-practices): Frameworks and criteria for distinguishing leads worth pursuing from those that will waste your team's time.
- [Red Flags to Avoid When Hiring a Lead Generation Specialist](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/red-flags-when-hiring-lead-gen-specialist): Warning signs in resumes, interviews, and early performance that predict a bad lead gen hire.
- [How to Write a Job Description for a Lead Generation Role](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/job-description-for-lead-generation-role): What to include, what to omit, and how to attract the right applicants with a clear, compelling posting.

### Lead Gen Fundamentals
- [What Makes a Qualified Lead vs. an Unqualified Lead?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/qualified-lead-vs-unqualified-lead): Defines the criteria that separate a real sales opportunity from a contact that isn't worth pursuing.
- [Lead Generation vs. Sales: What's the Difference?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/lead-generation-vs-sales): Clarifies the distinct roles, goals, and handoff points between lead generation and the sales close.
- [What's the Difference Between Lead Generation and Lead Qualification?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/lead-generation-vs-lead-qualification): Explains the two-stage funnel and why conflating the roles leads to inefficiency and missed revenue.
- [What Does a Lead Generation Specialist Actually Do Day-to-Day?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/what-does-lead-gen-specialist-do-daily): A realistic look at the daily activities, tools, and cadences of a working lead generation specialist.
- [What's the Best Way to Contact Leads?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/best-way-to-contact-leads): Compares phone, email, text, and LinkedIn outreach by response rate and best use case for service businesses.

### Tools & Tactics
- [How to Use LinkedIn Sales Navigator for Lead Generation](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/linkedin-sales-navigator-for-lead-generation): A practical walkthrough of Sales Navigator filters, saved searches, and outreach workflows for local B2B prospecting.
- [How to Attract Inbound Leads Instead of Hiring for Outbound](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/attract-inbound-leads-vs-outbound-hiring): Strategies for building content, SEO, and referral systems that reduce reliance on outbound prospecting headcount.
- [What Tools Do Professional Lead Generators Use?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/tools-professional-lead-generators-use): A curated overview of the prospecting, CRM, and automation tools common in effective lead gen workflows.
- [How to Find Leads Using LinkedIn for Your Sales Team](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/how-to-find-leads-on-linkedin): Step-by-step guidance on using LinkedIn organically to identify and engage decision-makers in your target market.

### Performance & Metrics
- [How Long Does It Take to See Results From a Lead Generation Hire?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/how-long-to-see-results-from-lead-gen-hire): Sets realistic timelines for ramp-up and first results so owners know when to expect ROI from a new hire.
- [How Many Leads Does Your Business Lose per Month?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/how-many-leads-is-your-business-losing): A diagnostic framework for estimating hidden lead leakage and its dollar impact on annual revenue.

### Industry & Strategy
- [Lead Generation for B2B: What's Different About Hiring?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/lead-generation-for-b2b-hiring-guide): How B2B sales cycles, deal sizes, and buyer behavior change what you need in a lead gen hire.
- [What Industries Benefit Most From Hiring Lead Generators?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/industries-that-benefit-from-lead-generators): Which business types see the strongest ROI from dedicated lead generation staff and why.
- [Lead Generation Agency vs. Freelancer: Which Is Better?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/lead-gen-agency-vs-freelancer): A side-by-side comparison of agencies and solo freelancers on cost, accountability, and output quality.
- [How to Train a New Lead Generation Hire](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/how-to-train-lead-generation-hire): An onboarding framework covering tools, messaging, targeting, and performance expectations for the first 90 days.
- [How to Qualify B2B Leads Effectively](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/how-to-qualify-b2b-leads): B2B-specific qualification criteria and conversation frameworks that improve pipeline quality and close rates.
- [Lead Generation for Startups: How to Start?](https://branchandrootconsulting.com/guides/lead-generation-for-startups): A first-principles guide to building lead generation from scratch when budget, brand, and team are limited.

## Contact
